title: Figma learning lab: express yourself with Figma Draw
speakers: Laura Butvinik (Manager, Education Content Strategy, Figma), Rachel Platt (Education Designer, Figma), Kristen Bates (Education Content Strategist, Figma)
key_points: A hands-on, collaborative learning lab session where attendees come together to create a single shared art piece.
The session celebrates expressive design and showcases what's possible with Figma Draw.
Attendees are asked to bring their laptop so they can actively participate in the collaborative creation.
Participants are invited to continue afterward in the Learning Lab Lounge for informal time with the Figma team.
